name: cowork-mvp
description: Callan's MVP marketplace for the Bloomerang AI Platform Engineer interview — a small set of skills that compose Google Workspace and the Bloomerang donor CRM, built to demonstrate the marketplace-of-skills pattern.

plugins.name: meeting-prep
plugins.description: Composes Google Calendar, Gmail, and Drive into a one-command meeting brief.

plugins.name: thank-you
plugins.description: Drafts personalized thank-you emails for recent donors by composing Bloomerang giving history with Gmail.
